source_label: Fast Company — Moonvalley releases Marey ("pronounced Mary")
notes: Marey is Moonvalley's foundational AI video model (beta March 2025, GA July 2025), trained exclusively on licensed footage and marketed as the first "commercially safe" model for professional filmmaking; API available via fal.ai. Named after 19th-century French chronophotographer Étienne-Jules Marey. Fast Company and other press state it is pronounced exactly like the given name "Mary" — MAIR-ee, stress on the first syllable. The common mistake is a French-style "mah-RAY" (/maˈreɪ/) or spelling-based "MAR-ee," non-obvious because the honoree's French surname is [maʁɛ] (ma-REH) yet the product deliberately anglicizes to "Mary."
